source_name: Code4rena Ethena Labs Findings and Analysis Report (2024-11) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: TheGATEKEEPER_ROLE shouldn’t be allowed to remove the COLLATERAL_MANAGER_ROLE
why_it_looked_bad: From the readme, the GATEKEEPER has the ability to disable minting and redeeming. | Role | Description | |-------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | GATEKEEPER | has the ability to disable minting and redeeming |
why_not_valid: overbroad gatekeeper authority is privileged-role design risk, not a permissionless exploit without a compromised or malicious gatekeeper
downgrade_reason: overbroad gatekeeper authority is privileged-role design risk, not a permissionless exploit without a compromised or malicious gatekeeper
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if combined with permissionless access or large-value state transitions
if the affected path becomes critical to mint/redeem/withdrawal solvency or availability
